name: @baohaus/goose-word
description: Local-first markdown word processor with browser-native speech and optional edge deploy targets

notes: Local MVP installs are directories copied under ~/.goose-word/bao/<id>.
Do not commit .bao, .zip, .tar, or .tar.gz package archives.

whisper.fallback: copy a small local model beside the plugin package

tts.fallback: local command service plugin may be mounted later
